summary: The same Fox News BREAKING NEWS clip as the related post: aerial Los Angeles operation footage plus Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons in an interview box. He speaks about a ramming incident and about assaults on officers. The segment is a cable-news segment with no music.
notable_text: FOX NEWS ALERT; BREAKING NEWS: U.S. MARSHAL AND ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT SHOT DURING LOS ANGELES IMMIGRATION OPERATION; Todd Lyons, Acting I.C.E. Director
